purpose: Declare audio asset categories for future CC0 import validation without vendoring third-party binaries.

categories.name: ui_sfx
categories.intended_use: future button, confirm, cancel, and menu sounds

categories.name: battle_sfx
categories.intended_use: future hit, cast, defend, and defeat sounds

categories.name: ambient_sfx
categories.intended_use: future room, town, dungeon, and travel ambience

categories.name: music
categories.intended_use: future town, dungeon, battle, and victory loops

license_status: repository-owned placeholder metadata; no external asset imported
